name: AniKai
description: Anime streaming platform with fast servers and a minimal interface. Supports both sub and dub playback.

name: Animetsu
description: Free anime streaming with a clean interface. Browse a wide range of subbed and dubbed series updated regularly.

name: AniMixPlay
description: Feature-rich anime platform with focus on simplicity and user experience. Offers watch progress tracking, multiple sources, and clean interface for seamless anime discovery.

name: anipy.stream
description: Open-source, self-hosted anime streaming server with 100% ad-free experience. Features ultra-fast streaming and direct downloads from AnimePahe through a lightweight FastAPI backend.

name: AniwatchX
description: Clean, fast, and ad-free anime streaming platform with modern UI. Features high-quality streams, dark mode, mobile-friendly design, and no pop-ups or clutter.

name: GogoAnime
description: One of the most established free anime sites with extensive library including both subbed and dubbed content. Features daily updates, user-friendly interface, and genre-based browsing.

name: Hoopla
description: Free streaming service available through participating public libraries. Access anime titles using your library card with no ads and high-quality streams.

name: Miruro
description: Niche anime platform focusing on user experience with modern design and minimal buffering. Features clean interface and smooth playback for uninterrupted viewing.

name: NepoFlix
description: Open-source platform offering free movies, TV shows, and anime with no sign-ups or subscriptions. Features modern interface, multiple backup sources, mobile-friendly design, and download options.

name: Peacock Free
description: Free tier offering major shonen titles including Naruto, Hunter x Hunter, and Jujutsu Kaisen. Perfect for mainstream anime fans who don't want to pay.

name: Pluto TV
description: Free live and on-demand anime streaming with 24/7 anime channels. Features 800+ hours of content including Naruto, Bleach, One Piece, and an 'Anime x HIDIVE' co-branded channel.

name: RetroCrush
description: Dedicated free streaming service focused on classic and vintage anime titles. Perfect for fans of old-school anime, featuring cult classics and rare retro titles with ad-supported viewing.

name: MyAnimeList
description: The largest anime and manga database and community. Track what you're watching, rate series, and get recommendations.

name: AniList
description: Modern anime and manga tracker with a clean interface and powerful stats. A popular alternative to MyAnimeList.

name: Crunchyroll
description: Official simulcasts of the newest anime episodes from Japan plus a massive back-catalogue and manga library.

name: Mangadex
description: Community-driven manga reader with thousands of titles translated by fan scanlation groups across many languages.

name: 9anime
description: Free anime streaming site with subbed and dubbed episodes. Large library updated quickly after Japanese air dates.

name: Anime-Planet
description: Anime and manga recommendations database with legal streaming links. One of the oldest anime communities online.

name: Zoro.to
description: Free anime streaming with both subbed and dubbed releases. Fast updates and a large back-catalogue of series.

name: HiAnime
description: Popular free anime streaming site with frequent simulcast updates and a clean ad-light player.

name: Funimation
description: Long-running anime streaming service now merged into Crunchyroll, still referenced for its dub catalogue.

name: VIZ
description: Official English publisher of manga like One Piece and Naruto. Read the latest chapters legally and support creators.

name: Anime Trending
description: Anime news, award shows, and community voting events. Stay current on industry announcements and fan polls.
